# Pouf Furniture
B2B furniture manufacturer and exporter from İnegöl, Turkey.
25 years of family expertise. Luxury and Contemporary collections.

## Products
- Luxury Collection: 12 sofa and dining suite models with ornate gold accents
- Contemporary Collection: 10 modern sofa models in bouclé, leather, and performance fabrics

## About
Pouf is a premium Turkish furniture brand rooted in İnegöl — the heartland of Turkish furniture manufacturing. Built on 25 years of family expertise, we supply wholesalers, retailers, and trade partners worldwide. We collaborate with 10+ trusted manufacturers in İnegöl and operate our own production line.

## Services
- B2B wholesale export (full container and LCL)
- OEM and private label manufacturing
- Custom colourways and material substitutions
- FOB, CIF, and DDP export terms
- 2-year structural warranty on all products

Website: https://www.pouffurnitures.com
